title: DieYourWay
description: A data driven death message mod.
body:
## DieYourWay

**Requires [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/) and [Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api)**

*Thank you to Apace for making Calio and Apoli both of which made this mod possible.*


##
Die Your Way is a mod that allows for data driven death messages via json files in a datapack.

## 
### How it works?:

In your data file you specify a damage condition and/or entity condition, you also specify any death messages you wish to add (in json format).


##
The chat will then instead send this generated death message upon a player's death if all specified conditions are met by the damage source and the player respectively.
